execution: runhwx.exe -client HyperWorksDesktop -plugin HyperworksLauncher -profile HyperworksLauncher -l en -startwith HyperMesh -f probe3.py

batch_mode_b_flag.reason: hm module requires initialized HyperMesh session; -b flag skips initialization, import hm raises 'HyperMesh is not initialized'

hmbatch_tcl_only.note: hmbatch.exe only supports -tcl flag, no Python API

key_findings.batch_flag: -b does NOT work for Python (HyperMesh not initialized)
